description: Complete WoW Spell.dbc boolean flags extracted from wowdev wiki. 16 spell attribute groups (SpellAttr0-SpellAttr15 including SpellAttr0 custom flags) plus proc flags.

statistics.note: SpellAttr0 includes 32 standard + 25 custom (CU) flags = 57 total

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_PROC_FAILURE_BURNS_CHARGE
SpellAttr0.comment: The spell will consume a charge that is natural or procced even if it fails to apply it's effect.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_USES_RANGED_SLOT
SpellAttr0.comment: Source: "Use ammo, ranged attack range modifiers, ranged haste, etc."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ON_NEXT_SWING_NO_DAMAGE
SpellAttr0.comment: Source: "Both "on next swing" attributes have identical handling in server & client.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_DO_NOT_LOG_IMMUNE_MISSES
SpellAttr0.comment: Self descriptive. Not set in 3.0.3. Possibly not used in later versions as well.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_IS_ABILITY
SpellAttr0.comment: Client puts "Ability" instead of "Spell" in the strings associated with this spell. Source: "Cannot be reflected, not affected by cast speed modifiers, etc."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_IS_TRADESKILL
SpellAttr0.comment: Source: "Displayed in recipe list, not affected by cast speed modifiers."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_PASSIVE
SpellAttr0.comment: Passive spell and lists them accordingly. Source: "Spell is automatically cast on self by core."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_DO_NOT_DISPLAY_SPELLBOOK_AURA_ICON_COMBAT_LOG
SpellAttr0.comment: These spells will be hidden from the spellbook, the list of aura icons, and partially from the combat log, but only on the client.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_DO_NOT_LOG
SpellAttr0.comment: This attribute controls whether the spell appears in combat logs. This attribute will focus on the removal of all aspects of combat log activity in relation to the spell.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_HELD_ITEM_ONLY
SpellAttr0.comment: Source: "Client will automatically select main-hand item as cast target."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ON_NEXT_SWING
SpellAttr0.comment: Source: "Both "on next swing" attributes have identical handling in server & client."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_WEARER_CASTS_PROC_TRIGGER
SpellAttr0.comment: Source: Marker attribute to show auras that trigger another spell (either directly or with a script).

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_SERVER_ONLY
SpellAttr0.comment: Used for server side scripts? Needs a real description.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ALLOW_ITEM_SPELL_IN_PVP
SpellAttr0.comment: Needs a description.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_INDOORS_ONLY
SpellAttr0.comment: Opposite of SPELL_ATTR0_OUTDOORS_ONLY.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_OUTDOORS_ONLY
SpellAttr0.comment: Only useable outdoors (Above ground level or not inside of a WMO for example).

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_NOT_SHAPESHIFTED
SpellAttr0.comment: Spell may not be cast while under the effect of a conditional dependent Shapeshift.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ONLY_STEALTHED
SpellAttr0.comment: Must be in stealth (affected by ShapeshiftForm-FORM_STEALTH).

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_DO_NOT_SHEATH
SpellAttr0.comment: Leaves your weapons (if) sheathed during spell animation. Source: "Does not sheathe weapons (client only)."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_SCALES_WITH_CREATURE_LEVEL
SpellAttr0.comment: Spell damage depends on level of the caster. Source: "For non-player casts, scale impact and power cost with caster's level."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CANCELS_AUTO_ATTACK_COMBAT
SpellAttr0.comment: Cancels current auto-attack when cast.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_NO_ACTIVE_DEFENSE
SpellAttr0.comment: Cannot be Dodged, Parried, or Blocked. Prevents physical based avoidance.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_TRACK_TARGET_IN_CAST_PLAYER_ONLY
SpellAttr0.comment: Automatically forces player to face the target when casting. Applicable only on the client.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ALLOW_CAST_WHILE_DEAD
SpellAttr0.comment: Attribute that allows a spell to be cast while in the dead state as well as ghost state.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ALLOW_WHILE_MOUNTED
SpellAttr0.comment: Spell can be cast while mounted.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_COOLDOWN_ON_EVENT
SpellAttr0.comment: Activate a cooldown after aura expiration, current summon removed, or go script. Spell is unusable while already active and cooldown does not begin until the effects have worn off.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_AURA_IS_DEBUFF
SpellAttr0.comment: Forces the spell to be handled as negative. Ex. Aura is shown in the debuff bar.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_ALLOW_WHILE_SITTING
SpellAttr0.comment: Spell can be cast while sitting.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_NOT_IN_COMBAT_ONLY_PEACEFUL
SpellAttr0.comment: Cannot be used in combat (Only Peaceful).

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_NO_IMMUNITIES
SpellAttr0.comment: Unaffected by Invulnerability. Source: "Allows spell to pierce invulnerability, unless the invulnerability spell also has this attribute."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_HEARTBEAT_RESIST
SpellAttr0.comment: Periodic resistance checks. Source: "Periodically re-rolls against resistance to potentially expire the aura early." Needed for PROC_FLAG_HEARTBEAT.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_NO_AURA_CANCEL
SpellAttr0.comment: Aura cannot be canceled or right-clicked off. Source: "Prevents the player from voluntarily canceling a positive aura."

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_ENCHANT_PROC
SpellAttr0.comment: Spell that procs has enchantment relationship. Ex. Colossus(116631) damage absorb.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_CONE_BACK
SpellAttr0.comment: Affects the spell cone(path) area. See [Implicit Targets](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectImplicitTarget "Spell.dbc/EffectImplicitTarget") and [Target Restrictions](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/SpellTargetRestrictions "DB/SpellTargetRestrictions") for additional information.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_CONE_LINE
SpellAttr0.comment: Similar to SPELL_ATTR0_CU_CONE_BACK. Ex. Vehicle attacks affected by the Z-axis.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_SHARE_DAMAGE
SpellAttr0.comment: Implies [Effect Aura](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName") 300 SPELL_AURA_SHARE_DAMAGE_PCT. Ex. Council type bosses that share a health pool.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_NO_INITIAL_THREAT
SpellAttr0.comment: Seems the same as SPELL_ATTR2_NO_INITIAL_THREAT. Might have uses when the original causes conflicts or is not functioning properly.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_AURA_CC
SpellAttr0.comment: Can modify functionality to behave with crowd controlled effects like stun, freeze, etc.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DONT_BREAK_STEALTH
SpellAttr0.comment: Likely very similar to SPELL_ATTR1_ALLOW_WHILE_STEALTHED. This might also override SPELL_ATTR1_FAILURE_BREAKS_STEALTH.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_CAN_CRIT
SpellAttr0.comment: The opposite of SPELL_ATTR2_CANT_CRIT. Bypass restrictive attributes and [combinations](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/Effect "Spell.dbc/Effect") such as SPELL_EFFECT_NORMALIZED_WEAPON_DMG + SPELL_EFFECT_HEAL_PCT which effectively disable criticals.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DIRECT_DAMAGE
SpellAttr0.comment: Could imply spell functionality modification such as (Direct Damage - Spell) from [SpellCategory](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/SpellCategory "DB/SpellCategory").

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_CHARGE
SpellAttr0.comment: This might imply [Effect Aura](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName") 411 SPELL_AURA_MOD_MAX_CHARGES or modify charge timing on spells which can also be found in SpellCategory.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_PICKPOCKET
SpellAttr0.comment: Allows access to the pickpocket loot table of an enemy.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_ROLLING_PERIODIC
SpellAttr0.comment: Seems like a combination of SPELL_ATTR4_OBSOLETE + SPELL_ATTR10_ROLLING_PERIODIC.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF0
SpellAttr0.comment: Possible combination of SPELL_ATTR4_OBSOLETE + SPELL_ATTR0_AURA_IS_DEBUFF.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF1
SpellAttr0.comment: Unknown differences between this and SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF0 or SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF2.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF2
SpellAttr0.comment: Unknown differences between this and SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF0 or SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_NEGATIVE_EFF1.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_IGNORE_ARMOR
SpellAttr0.comment: Implies [Effect Aura](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName") 345 SPELL_AURA_BYPASS_ARMOR_FOR_CASTER. Ex. Cleave damage so the calculations does not get reduced multiple times.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_REQ_TARGET_FACING_CASTER
SpellAttr0.comment: Similar to SPELL_ATTR0_TRACK_TARGET_IN_CAST_PLAYER_ONLY except the target is affected and this attribute is not client restricted.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_REQ_CASTER_BEHIND_TARGET
SpellAttr0.comment: Another EffectPos_facing similar attribute. An example for this would be backstab like spells. See SPELL_ATTR4_USE_FACING_FROM_SPELL description for more.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_ALLOW_INFLIGHT_TARGET
SpellAttr0.comment: This may allow override for unit InhabitType; and possibly function similar to SPELL_ATTR6_CAN_TARGET_UNTARGETABLE or SpellMisc server side defined attributes.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_NEEDS_AMMO_DATA
SpellAttr0.comment: It is likely this is either referring to deprecated(version dependent) hunter ammunition or a vehicle mechanic.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_BINARY_SPELL
SpellAttr0.comment: Spell can be 1 or 0. Example of spells that can be toggled on or off with an infinite duration would be a primary example.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_SCHOOLMASK_NORMAL_WITH_MAGIC
SpellAttr0.comment: Sets the school to 1 + 126? In 5.4.8, a value of 127 is Chaos damage. More information at [SchoolMask](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/SchoolMask "Spell.dbc/SchoolMask").

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_DEPRECATED_LIQUID_AURA
SpellAttr0.comment: Similar to the other custom deprecated attributes. An example of liquid auras could be the debuff from Naxxramas slime.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_IS_TALENT
SpellAttr0.comment: This attribute may deal with talent descriptions; and it might be used in complex spells in identifying the most prominent component ID or simply function like SPELL_ATTR0_IS_ABILITY.

SpellAttr0.name: SPELL_ATTR0_CU_AURA_CANNOT_BE_SAVED
SpellAttr0.comment: Aura is not saved in the database. One reason would be to prevent exploits (having a buff where it should not be).

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_DISMISS_PET_FIRST
SpellAttr1.comment: For spells without this flag the client doesn't allow summoning a pet if the caster already has a pet.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_USE_ALL_MANA
SpellAttr1.comment: Uses all power (Ex. Lay on Hands, Bunyanize). Source: "Ignores listed power cost and drains entire pool instead."

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_IS_CHANNELED
SpellAttr1.comment: Spell is channeled. Spell is handled equally with client and server.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NO_REDIRECTION
SpellAttr1.comment: No redirection to another target. Ignores spells with the "SPELL_AURA_SPELL_MAGNET" // [Effect Aura 96](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName"). (Alternate: All spell effects are harmful.)

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NO_SKILL_INCREASE
SpellAttr1.comment: Does not give a skill up point.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_ALLOW_WHILE_STEALTHED
SpellAttr1.comment: Does not break Stealth.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_IS_SELF_CHANNELLED
SpellAttr1.comment: Spell is self channeled. Spell is handled equally with client and server.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NO_REFLECTION
SpellAttr1.comment: Spell will bypass any reflection effects.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_ONLY_PEACEFUL_TARGETS
SpellAttr1.comment: Can only target out of combat units.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_INITIATES_COMBAT_ENABLES_AUTO_ATTACK
SpellAttr1.comment: Player starts melee combat after this spell is cast. Initiates combat (enables auto-attack).

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NO_THREAT
SpellAttr1.comment: Does not generate threat on cast and will not initiate combat.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_AURA_UNIQUE
SpellAttr1.comment: Source: "Aura will not refresh it's duration when recast".

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_FAILURE_BREAKS_STEALTH
SpellAttr1.comment: Failure breaks Stealth. (Pickpocket).

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_TOGGLE_FAR_SIGHT
SpellAttr1.comment: Client removes Farsight on aura loss.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_TRACK_TARGET_IN_CHANNEL
SpellAttr1.comment: Client automatically forces player to face target when channeling.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_IMMUNITY_PURGES_EFFECT
SpellAttr1.comment: Remove negative auras on immunity. Source: "For immunity spells, cancel all auras that this spell would make you immune to when the spell is applied."

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_IMMUNITY_TO_HOSTILE_AND_FRIENDLY_EFFECTS
SpellAttr1.comment: Causes harmful and helpful spells cast on a target with this to be immune such as Cyclone. (School Immunity Only).

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NO_AUTOCAST_AI
SpellAttr1.comment: No AutoCast by Pet or similar AI.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_PREVENTS_ANIM
SpellAttr1.comment: Stun, Polymorph, Daze, Hex, etc. Auras apply "UNIT_FLAG_PREVENT_EMOTES_FROM_CHAT_TEXT".

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_EXCLUDE_CASTER
SpellAttr1.comment: Excludes caster from spell effects even if not the primary target.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_FINISHING_MOVE_DAMAGE
SpellAttr1.comment: Finishing Move - Damage. Combo Point related.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_THREAT_ONLY_ON_MISS
SpellAttr1.comment: Untested if this implies all functions listed under SpellMissInfo aside from Miss such as Parry, Dodge, Resist, etc.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_FINISHING_MOVE_DURATION
SpellAttr1.comment: Finishing Move - Duration. Combo Point related.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_IGNORE_OWNERS_DEATH
SpellAttr1.comment: Unaffected by death of owner. Possibly works with temporary summons as well?

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_SPECIAL_SKILLUP
SpellAttr1.comment: Only Fishing spells.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_AURA_STAYS_AFTER_COMBAT
SpellAttr1.comment: Self descriptive. Not all spells need this to have this effect.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_REQUIRE_ALL_TARGETS
SpellAttr1.comment: Works correctly with \[target=focus\] and \[target=mouseover\] macros? (Used in many vehicle type spells)

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_DISCOUNT_POWER_ON_MISS
SpellAttr1.comment: This attribute is almost exclusive with spells that consume combo-point-like secondary resources.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NO_AURA_ICON
SpellAttr1.comment: Client doesn't display these spells in aura bar.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_NAME_IN_CHANNEL_BAR
SpellAttr1.comment: Spell name is displayed in cast bar instead of "Channeling" text in Channel Bar. (Client Only).

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_DISPEL_ALL_STACKS
SpellAttr1.comment: Dispel all stacks instead of one at a time.

SpellAttr1.name: SPELL_ATTR1_CAST_WHEN_LEARNED
SpellAttr1.comment: Casts the spell when learned.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_BYPASS_VISIBILITY_CHECK
SpellAttr10.comment: Probably similar to SPELL_ATTR2_IGNORE_LINE_OF_SIGHT. (Ex. Frost Fever.)

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_IGNORE_POSITIVE_DAMAGE_TAKEN_MODIFIERS
SpellAttr10.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_USES_RANGED_SLOT_COSMETIC_ONLY
SpellAttr10.comment: Will generate a ranged weapon on the caster of this spell if one is not equipped to complete the animation.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_DO_NOT_LOG_FULL_OVERHEAL
SpellAttr10.comment: Combat log will ignore any healing past maximum health.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_NPC_KNOCKBACK_IGNORE_DOORS
SpellAttr10.comment: Knockout mechanic or other forced movement effects. Alternate Header - WATER_SPOUT.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_FORCE_NON_BINARY_RESISTANCE
SpellAttr10.comment: Makes a spell ignore full resistance? Found on Immolate(348) in 5.4.8.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_NO_SUMMON_LOG
SpellAttr10.comment: Removes the entry and thus any object created by a spell from the combat log so as not to be clickable.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_IGNORE_INSTANCE_LOCK_AND_FARM_LIMIT_ON_TELEPORTATION
SpellAttr10.comment: Ignore instance lock and re-entry limits on teleportation. Alternate Header - TELEPORT_PLAYER.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_DONT_CANCEL_WHEN_ALL_EFFECTS_ARE_DISABLED
SpellAttr10.comment: Prevents pre-mature cancellation of spell if effects are nullified? (Found on Cone on Cold(120) in 5.4.8.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_CHARGE_JUMP_CHARGE_USE_ABSOLUTE_SPEED
SpellAttr10.comment: Involved with spells that move an entity at a faster than normalized rate of speed such as Death Grip.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_PROC_COOLDOWN_ON_A_PER_TARGET_BASIS
SpellAttr10.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_HERB_GATHERING_MINING
SpellAttr10.comment: Lock chest at precast. Likely means to tap the node once clicked.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_USE_SPELL_BASE_LEVEL_FOR_SCALING
SpellAttr10.comment: This particular attribute was either swapped or changed at some point with SPELL_ATTR2_RETAIN_ITEM_CAST. Otherwise, Self descriptive.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_RESET_COOLDOWN_ON_ENCOUNTER_END
SpellAttr10.comment: Reset cooldown upon ending an encounter. This can be used to remove longer cooldowns after combat.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_ROLLING_PERIODIC
SpellAttr10.comment: Add remaining periodic damage to new aura when refreshed. Ex. Ignite Mastery. May also apply to HoTs.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_SPELLBOOK_HIDDEN_UNTIL_OVERRIDDEN
SpellAttr10.comment: Spell is not in spellbook until another takes it place. (Ex. Symbiosis replacing the default null spell with the class specific one.)

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_DEFEND_AGAINST_FRIENDLY_CAST
SpellAttr10.comment: Unknown. Found on Mage spell Living Bomb(44461) in 5.4.8.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_CAN_DODGE_PARRY_WHILE_CASTING
SpellAttr10.comment: Allows defensive abilities to continue. Ex. Blooddrinker(DK, Legion).

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_STARTS_TICKING_AT_AURA_APPLICATION
SpellAttr10.comment: Spell ticks when aura is applied instead of waiting for a specified time. Possibly same or very similar to SPELL_ATTR5_EXTRA_INITIAL_PERIOD.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_UNK19
SpellAttr10.comment: Unknown. Couldn't match any but header may be implemented elsewhere. Only 4 (3 valid) spells in 5.4.8.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_MULTI_CLICK_GROUND_TARGETING
SpellAttr10.comment: Involved in certain objects that create spells that must be placed in the world.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_AOE_CAN_HIT_SUMMONED_INVIS
SpellAttr10.comment: Allows the spell to interact with certain invisible (possibly trigger or quest entities).

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_UNK22
SpellAttr10.comment: All of these spells are almost exclusive to bonus loot and active/loot specialization rolls. Header seems like CAN_HIT_AOE_UNTARGETABLE but would not make much sense.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_UNK23
SpellAttr10.comment: Unknown. Unused in 5.4.8.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_UPDATE_PASSIVES_ON_APPLY_REMOVE
SpellAttr10.comment: It is likely this attribute will update relevant spells in relation to this spell. Ex. Titan's Grip.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_NORMAL_MELEE_ATTACK
SpellAttr10.comment: Treats the spell as if it were a normal (white) melee hit.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_IGNORE_FEIGN_DEATH
SpellAttr10.comment: Should produce similar effects to that of having the 65,536(CREATURE_FLAG_EXTRA_IGNORE_FEIGN_DEATH) extra flag set in creature templates.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_CASTER_DEATH_CANCELS_PERSISTENT_AREA_AURAS
SpellAttr10.comment: Auras with this flag will disappear immediately when the caster dies. Similar to [Spell Effect](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/Effect "Spell.dbc/Effect") 177.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_DO_NOT_LOG_ABSORB
SpellAttr10.comment: This prevents spells with an absorb from being logged by the client. Ex. The Overkill absorb from Ardent Defender.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_MOUNT_IS_NOT_ACCOUNT_WIDE
SpellAttr10.comment: This Mount is not placed on the account level. This mount is stored per character instead. Ex. PvP Gladiator Mount.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_PREVENT_CLIENT_CAST_CANCEL
SpellAttr10.comment: Prevents channeled spells from being cancelled.

SpellAttr10.name: SPELL_ATTR10_CHAIN_BY_MOST_HIT
SpellAttr10.comment: Deals with spells that chain to multiple targets; "most" is usually your initial target.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_LOCK_CASTER_MOVEMENT_AND_FACING_WHILE_CASTING
SpellAttr11.comment: Locks the current model animation and continually face the destination of the spell. Certain motions can result in a visual glitch of the spell if ignored.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_DONT_CANCEL_WHEN_ALL_EFFECTS_ARE_DISABLED
SpellAttr11.comment: Spell aura will not end prematurely if the effects become inactive. Can be found on many spells such as Cripple.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_DO_NOT_LOG_ON_LEARN
SpellAttr11.comment: This will prevent the client from logging these spells when learned.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_HIDE_SHAPESHIFT_REQUIREMENTS
SpellAttr11.comment: Used mainly in Monk spells to not clutter the combat log with a long error reason. (Must be used in Serpent Stance, Ox Stance, Tiger Stance.)

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_UNBREAKABLE_CHANNEL
SpellAttr11.comment: Allows the channel of a spell to only be removed by scripted means. Ex. Spells such as a rope used to gather animals for a quest.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_RANK_IGNORES_CASTER_LEVEL
SpellAttr11.comment: Alternate header: Ignore Caster's spell. Source: "level Spell_C_GetSpellRank returns SpellLevels->MaxLevel \* 5 instead of std::min(SpellLevels->MaxLevel, caster->Level) \* 5".

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_TRANSFER_MOUNT_SPELL
SpellAttr11.comment: Found on Zen Flight in 5.4.8. This probably carries over your ground/flight speed and other mount related properties.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_IGNORE_SPELLCAST_OVERRIDE_SHAPESHIFT_REQUIREMENTS
SpellAttr11.comment: Ex. Allows a spell that Dark Simulacrum copies to be used by the Death Knight even if it required a shapeshift.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_NEWEST_EXCLUSIVE_COMPLETE
SpellAttr11.comment: Unknown. Can be found on Stealth(1784) Rogue spell and other uncategorized stealth-like spells.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_NOT_ON_PLAYER_CONTROLLED_NPC
SpellAttr11.comment: Self descriptive. Found on many passive buffs that affect grouped allies such as Unholy Aura, Moonkin Aura, etc.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_IGNORE_PVP_POWER
SpellAttr11.comment: Ignore PvP Power. Causes the spell to ignore any additional damage or healing granted by PvP Power.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_NOT_USABLE_IN_CHALLENGE_MODE
SpellAttr11.comment: Self descriptive. Challenge Mode in MoP was the precursor to Mythic+. Very commonly paired with SPELL_ATTR12_UNK17.

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_IGNORE_TARGET_ABSORB_MODIFIERS
SpellAttr11.comment: Assuming this applies to both positive and negative. Ex. Illuminated Healing (Holy Paladin Mastery).

SpellAttr11.name: SPELL_ATTR11_ALLOW_HARMFUL_ON_FRIENDLY
SpellAttr11.comment: Spells have the potential to damage allies even if they weren't the intended target. (Ex. The detonation portion of a Living Bomb reflected by to the Mage.)

SpellAttr12.name: SPELL_ATTR12_TREAT_SELF_CAST_AS_REFLECT
SpellAttr12.comment: If spell is redirected or ignore restrictions to target the caster it will be considered a reflect likely ending the spell.

SpellAttr12.name: SPELL_ATTR12_NOT_IN_PROVING_GROUNDS
SpellAttr12.comment: Spell is not active while inside of the proving grounds scenario introduced in MoP.

SpellAttr6.comment: Ex. "Bleeding" appearing where damage numbers would normally be at.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_ABSORB_CANNOT_BE_IGNORE
SpellAttr6.comment: Self descriptive but vague title. Found on spells like Ardent Defender.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_TAPS_IMMEDIATELY
SpellAttr6.comment: This could reference a variety of events from creatures to game objects. Ex. Drain Soul.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_CAN_TARGET_UNTARGETABLE
SpellAttr6.comment: These spells bypass creatures with UNIT_FLAG_NOT_SELECTABLE and possibly CREATURE_FLAG_EXTRA_TRIGGER.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_DOESNT_RESET_SWING_TIMER_IF_INSTANT
SpellAttr6.comment: This could function similar to spells that have no global cooldown.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_VEHICLE_IMMUNITY_CATEGORY
SpellAttr6.comment: \*NYI\*, immunity to some buffs for some vehicles.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_IGNORE_HEALING_MODIFIERS
SpellAttr6.comment: Source: "This prevents certain healing modifiers from applying - see implementation for about details." (No source ref provided.)

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_DO_NOT_AUTO_SELECT_TARGET_WITH_INITIATES_COMBAT
SpellAttr6.comment: Found on Death Grip. String title wording is slightly confusing. (Client only).

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_IGNORE_CASTER_DAMAGE_MODIFIERS
SpellAttr6.comment: Source: "This prevents certain damage modifiers from applying - see implementation for details." (No source ref provided.)

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_DISABLE_TIED_EFFECT_POINTS
SpellAttr6.comment: The value used is likely from the [SpellEffect](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/SpellEffect "DB/SpellEffect") column EffectBasePoints post 5.0.1 and of the same name in [Spell.dbc](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/Spell "DB/Spell") for 3.3.5.

SpellAttr6.name: SPELL_ATTR6_NO_CATEGORY_COOLDOWN_MODS
SpellAttr6.comment: Spells with this attribute skip applying modifiers to category cooldowns found in [Spell Category](https://wowdev.wiki/SpellCategory.dbc "SpellCategory.dbc") or possibly [Spell Categories](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/SpellCategories "DB/SpellCategories") pending game version.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_ALLOW_SPELL_REFLECTION
SpellAttr7.comment: Allow spell to be reflected. Will likely interfere if used with SPELL_ATTR1_NO_REFLECTION.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_NO_TARGET_DURATION_MOD
SpellAttr7.comment: Duration is not affected by duration modifiers.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_DISABLE_AURA_WHILE_DEAD
SpellAttr7.comment: Source: "Reactivate at resurrect (client only)". Ex. Paladin auras.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_DEBUG_SPELL
SpellAttr7.comment: Cannot cast if caster doesn't have UNIT_FLAG2_ALLOW_CHEAT_SPELLS enabled. Sends a unique error message to the client if unusable.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_TREAT_AS_RAID_BUFF
SpellAttr7.comment: Spell assumes certain properties that would classify it as a "raid buff". (This is only a guess.)

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_CAN_BE_MULTI_CAST
SpellAttr7.comment: Involvement with spells that summon totems; otherwise vague.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_DONT_CAUSE_SPELL_PUSHBACK
SpellAttr7.comment: Source: "Damage dealt by this does not cause spell pushback."

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_PREPARE_FOR_VEHICLE_CONTROL_END
SpellAttr7.comment: Found on 66218 (Launch) spell. Attribute is most likely server side only.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_HORDE_SPECIFIC_SPELL
SpellAttr7.comment: Teleports, mounts, and other spells. This should cause these spells to not function or give an error message if Alliance player.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_ALLIANCE_SPECIFIC_SPELL
SpellAttr7.comment: Teleports, mounts, and other spells. This should cause these spells to not function or give an error message if Horde player.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_DISPEL_REMOVES_CHARGES
SpellAttr7.comment: Dispel and Spellsteal individual charges instead of whole aura. Ex. More than one stack of lifebloom on a target only steals one.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_CAN_CAUSE_INTERRUPT
SpellAttr7.comment: Will only allow this spell to interrupt non-player casting.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_CAN_CAUSE_SILENCE
SpellAttr7.comment: Will only Silence NPCs/creatures. (Not confirmed.)

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_NO_UI_NOT_INTERRUPTIBLE
SpellAttr7.comment: Can always be interrupted, even if caster is immune.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_RECAST_ON_RESUMMON
SpellAttr7.comment: Deprecated attribute(unknown when), there is no SPELL_GO sent anymore on pet resummon. Can be found on 52150 Raise Dead.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_RESET_SWING_TIMER_AT_SPELL_START
SpellAttr7.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_ONLY_IN_SPELLBOOK_UNTIL_LEARNED
SpellAttr7.comment: Source: "After learning these spells become hidden in spellbook (but are visible when not learned for low level characters)" Ex. Mount skillup.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_DO_NOT_LOG_PVP_KILL
SpellAttr7.comment: Unknown. (Note: Only used by 1 spell that is already filtered out in PvP credit because it is self targeting.)

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_ATTACK_ON_CHARGE_TO_UNIT
SpellAttr7.comment: Damage will trigger during animation driven charge and is (possibly) not hindered by it either.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_REPORT_SPELL_FAILURE_TO_UNIT_TARGET
SpellAttr7.comment: Combat or other server coded failure message may appear in the combat log for these spells when cast by NPCs. (Unsure if any soundbyte is sent.)

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_NO_CLIENT_FAIL_WHILE_STUNNED_FLEEING_CONFUSED
SpellAttr7.comment: Client will skip or bypass checking for stunned, fleeing, and confused states.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_RETAIN_COOLDOWN_THROUGH_LOAD
SpellAttr7.comment: Unable to extrapolate any meaningful information from this string.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_IGNORES_COLD_WEATHER_FLYING_REQUIREMENT
SpellAttr7.comment: Spell will bypass the flying requirement for Northrend.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_NO_ATTACK_DODGE
SpellAttr7.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_NO_ATTACK_PARRY
SpellAttr7.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_NO_ATTACK_MISS
SpellAttr7.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_TREAT_AS_NPC_AOE
SpellAttr7.comment: This may function like a combination of SPELL_ATTR5_TREAT_AS_AREA_EFFECT and other various properties not assigned to/function differently than the player.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_BYPASS_NO_RESURRECT_AURA
SpellAttr7.comment: Possibly created for mechanics such as the end of the lich king encounter. (This is only speculation.)

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_DO_NOT_COUNT_FOR_PVP_SCOREBOARD
SpellAttr7.comment: Used for certain spells that may inflate or create excessive gaps in the Battleground/Arena statistic sheet.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_REFLECTION_ONLY_DEFENDS
SpellAttr7.comment: This possibly allows for a spell to be reflected but not damage the target and instead act more as a deflect. Found on 69028 and 71237 in 3.3.5a.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_CAN_PROC_FROM_SUPPRESSED_TARGET_PROCS
SpellAttr7.comment: Has a synergistic effect with SPELL_ATTR3_SUPPRESS_TARGET_PROCS as far as attributes go.

SpellAttr7.name: SPELL_ATTR7_ALWAYS_CAST_LOG
SpellAttr7.comment: Source: "Client indicator (client only)."

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_NO_ATTACK_BLOCK
SpellAttr8.comment: Falls in line with SPELL_ATTR7_NO_ATTACK_DODGE, SPELL_ATTR7_NO_ATTACK_PARRY, and SPELL_ATTR7_NO_ATTACK_MISS for individual avoidances.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_IGNORE_DYNAMIC_OBJECT_CASTER
SpellAttr8.comment: Ignores target types of dynamic object. See [Implicit Targets](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectImplicitTarget "Spell.dbc/EffectImplicitTarget") for values.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_REMOVE_OUTSIDE_DUNGEONS_AND_RAIDS
SpellAttr8.comment: Spell (likely an aura effect) is removed when exiting a dungeon or raid it was applied in.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_ONLY_TARGET_IF_SAME_CREATOR
SpellAttr8.comment: Vague. Could be summon related.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_CAN_HIT_AOE_UNTARGETABLE
SpellAttr8.comment: This implies SPELL_ATTR6_CAN_TARGET_UNTARGETABLE in conjunction with [Effect Aura](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName") of 229 and SPELL_ATTR3_NOT_ON_AOE_IMMUNE if necessary.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_ALLOW_WHILE_CHARMED
SpellAttr8.comment: Opposite of SPELL_ATTR5_NOT_AVAILABLE_WHILE_CHARMED. This likely has quest implementations but can be thought of as using Divine Shield while Mind Controlled.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_AURA_REQUIRED_BY_CLIENT
SpellAttr8.comment: All auras are sent to the client with this attribute. These can be found at [Aura Flags](https://wowdev.wiki/Aura_Flags "Aura Flags").

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_IGNORE_SANCTUARY
SpellAttr8.comment: These spells will disregard the effects a sanctuary(Ex. Dalaran) will afford.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_USE_TARGETS_LEVEL_FOR_SPELL_SCALING
SpellAttr8.comment: Reduces a spell accordingly when used on a lower level player. Found with "All party and raid" in some descriptions on 5.4.8.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_PERIODIC_CAN_CRIT
SpellAttr8.comment: Allows DoTs and HoTs to be critical. This is not always needed for the effect to function.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_MIRROR_CREATURE_NAME
SpellAttr8.comment: Transform auras also override name and is handled clientside. Found in [Effect Aura](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName") 56.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_ONLY_PLAYERS_CAN_CAST_THIS_SPELL
SpellAttr8.comment: Like SPELL_ATTR3_ONLY_ON_PLAYER except on the casting side instead.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_AURA_POINTS_ON_CLIENT
SpellAttr8.comment: Aura must have flag AFLAG_ANY_EFFECT_AMOUNT_SENT to send amount(4.x only?). The list of AFLAGS can be found at [Aura Flags](https://wowdev.wiki/Aura_Flags "Aura Flags").

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_NOT_IN_SPELLBOOK_UNTIL_LEARNED
SpellAttr8.comment: Hides auto learned spells from the spellbook before learning them. Handled only on client side.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_TARGET_PROCS_ON_CASTER
SpellAttr8.comment: The target (receives) procs that occur on the caster (source) instead of aura target (destination). (Mildly convoluted explanation; seems very niche)

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_REQUIRES_LOCATION_TO_BE_ON_LIQUID_SURFACE
SpellAttr8.comment: Self descriptive. Ex. Water mounts such as the Strider.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_ONLY_TARGET_OWN_SUMMONS
SpellAttr8.comment: Self descriptive. These spells can only target creatures, objects, etc that only you have summoned.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_HASTE_AFFECTS_DURATION
SpellAttr8.comment: Reduces this spells duration relative to your current haste percent. The new value (DoTs, HoTs) is adjusted accordingly as well.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_IGNORE_SPELLCAST_OVERRIDE_COST
SpellAttr8.comment: A spell that has had its resource cost overridden will be ignored with this attribute for better and possibly worse.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_ALLOW_TARGETS_HIDDEN_BY_SPAWN_TRACKING
SpellAttr8.comment: Source: No spawn tracking implementation. Spawn Tracking has little information, an example can be found here [Wowhead Debug Quest](https://www.wowhead.com/quest=60474/spawn-tracking-unit-specified-world-effect-in-a-wmo-bug)

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_REQUIRES_EQUIPPED_INV_TYPES
SpellAttr8.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_NO_SUMMON_DEST_FROM_CLIENT_TARGETING_PATHING_REQUIREMENT
SpellAttr8.comment: A valid path to a [spell destination](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectImplicitTarget "Spell.dbc/EffectImplicitTarget") is not required if the current destination comes from client when using this attribute.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_MELEE_HASTE_AFFECTS_PERIODIC
SpellAttr8.comment: Very similar to [Effect Aura](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName "Spell.dbc/EffectApplyAuraName") 416, except this involves periodic ticks and not cooldowns.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_ENFORCE_IN_COMBAT_RESSURECTION_LIMIT
SpellAttr8.comment: Used to limit the number of battle resurrections in boss encounters.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_HEAL_PREDICTION
SpellAttr8.comment: Affects the Heal Prediction. Option must be turned on in Raid Profile from the settings screen to notice.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_NO_LEVEL_UP_TOAST
SpellAttr8.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_SKIP_IS_KNOWN_CHECK
SpellAttr8.comment: (Far too vague.) UI related.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_AI_FACE_TARGET
SpellAttr8.comment: Opposite of SPELL_ATTR5_AI_DOESNT_FACE_TARGET. See SPELL_ATTR4_USE_FACING_FROM_SPELL for more info.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_NOT_IN_BATTLEGROUND
SpellAttr8.comment: Opposite of SPELL_ATTR3_ONLY_BATTLEGROUNDS. Spells and items that are not allowed to be cast or used in Battlegrounds. Ex. Mass Resurrection Guild Perk.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_MASTERY_AFFECTS_POINTS
SpellAttr8.comment: Self descriptive. Unclear if the reference is the [Combat Rating](https://wowdev.wiki/CombatRatings "CombatRatings") or a flat amount.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_DISPLAY_LARGE_AURA_ICON_ON_UNIT_FRAMES_BOSS_AURA
SpellAttr8.comment: This is usually a dedicated screen space for an important buff or debuff during an encounter around a portrait.

SpellAttr8.name: SPELL_ATTR8_CAN_ATTACK_IMMUNE_PC
SpellAttr8.comment: This spell will skip/bypass checking a creature with the Unit_Flag(256)UNIT_FLAG_IMMUNE_TO_PC when executing IsValidAttackTarget.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_FORCE_DEST_LOCATION
SpellAttr9.comment: Ignores collision with terrain (unknown if this ignores the z-axis and allows a destination under the zone floor).

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_MOD_INVIS_INCLUDES_PARTY
SpellAttr9.comment: Causes invisibility auras to ignore the detection of party members who are also invisible.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_ONLY_WHEN_ILLEGALLY_MOUNTED
SpellAttr9.comment: No definition for what is considered "Illegally Mounted".

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_DO_NOT_LOG_AURA_REFRESH
SpellAttr9.comment: The combat log will not show when this spell has its duration refreshed.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_MISSILE_SPEED_IS_DELAY_IN_SEC
SpellAttr9.comment: Related to the travel time animation between when a spell has been cast and hits the target. See [SpellMissile](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/SpellMissile "DB/SpellMissile") for more information.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_IGNORE_TOTEM_REQUIREMENTS_FOR_CASTING
SpellAttr9.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_ITEM_CAST_GRANTS_SKILL_GAIN
SpellAttr9.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_DO_NOT_ADD_TO_UNLEARN_LIST
SpellAttr9.comment: Source: "The Unlearn List is not maintained by SMSG_SEND_UNLEARN_SPELLS and always remains empty."

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_COOLDOWN_IGNORES_RANGED_WEAPON
SpellAttr9.comment: Self descriptive. Possible bypass for ranged auto-attack GCD or the need for a ranged weapon as a whole.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_NOT_IN_ARENA
SpellAttr9.comment: Similar to SPELL_ATTR8_NOT_IN_BATTLEGROUND but in arena instead.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_TARGET_MUST_BE_GROUNDED
SpellAttr9.comment: Spell target must be on the map terrain. The target should be in the "ground" InhabitType but not necessarily restricted to it.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_ALLOW_WHILE_BANISHED_AURA_STATE
SpellAttr9.comment: Source: "On clients with version 10.2.7 and forward, this may function the same as SPELL_ATTR5_ALLOW_WHILE_STUNNED."

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_FACE_UNIT_TARGET_UPON_COMPLETION_OF_JUMP_CHARGE
SpellAttr9.comment: Face the target of a "Jump Charge" (clarity needed). Possibly similar to SPELL_ATTR0_TRACK_TARGET_IN_CAST_PLAYER_ONLY?

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_HASTE_AFFECTS_MELEE_ABILITY_CASTTIME
SpellAttr9.comment: Haste will benefit melee-based spells with a cast time. (GCD may also benefit?)

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_IGNORE_DEFAULT_RATED_BATTLEGROUND_RESTRICTIONS
SpellAttr9.comment: Should be similar to SPELL_ATTR4_IGNORE_DEFAULT_ARENA_RESTRICTIONS and "Makes spell usable despite CD > 10min" is expected.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_DO_NOT_DISPLAY_POWER_COST
SpellAttr9.comment: Does not display power cost. (Client Only).

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_NEXT_MODAL_SPELL_REQUIRES_SAME_UNIT_TARGET
SpellAttr9.comment: Source: "Prevents automatically casting the spell from [SpellClassOptions](https://wowdev.wiki/SpellClassOptions.dbc "SpellClassOptions.dbc")::ModalNextSpell after the current spell if a target was changed (client only).

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_AUTOCAST_OFF_BY_DEFAULT
SpellAttr9.comment: Self descriptive.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_IGNORE_SCHOOL_LOCKOUT
SpellAttr9.comment: Bypasses a [School](https://wowdev.wiki/Spell.dbc/SchoolMask "Spell.dbc/SchoolMask") lockout (Ex. Shadow was interrupted for X seconds) and allows casting anyway.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_ALLOW_DARK_SIMULACRUM
SpellAttr9.comment: Allows the Death Knight spell Dark Simulacrum to properly copy the spell and allow it to be used.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_ALLOW_CAST_WHILE_CHANNELING
SpellAttr9.comment: Very similar to SPELL_ATTR5_ALLOW_ACTIONS_DURING_CHANNEL but instead allows the cast of certain spells.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_SUPPRESS_VISUAL_KIT_ERRORS
SpellAttr9.comment: This will suppress all or most errors related to [SpellVisualKit](https://wowdev.wiki/DB/SpellVisualKit "DB/SpellVisualKit"). (Client Only).

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_SPELLCAST_OVERRIDE_IN_SPELLBOOK
SpellAttr9.comment: Vague String. (Client Only).

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_JUMPCHARGE_NO_FACING_CONTROL
SpellAttr9.comment: Another string related to "Jump Charge". This one seems the opposite of SPELL_ATTR9_FACE_UNIT_TARGET_UPON_COMPLETION_OF_JUMP_CHARGE.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_IGNORE_CASTER_HEALING_MODIFIERS
SpellAttr9.comment: The companion attribute to SPELL_ATTR6_IGNORE_CASTER_DAMAGE_MODIFIERS. Prevents certain healing modifiers from applying.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_DONT_CONSUME_CHARGE_IF_ITEM_DELETED
SpellAttr9.comment: Source: "Possibly an attribute created to prevent double item deletion?" This might used as a failsafe.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_ITEM_PASSIVE_ON_CLIENT
SpellAttr9.comment: Vague String. (Client Only).

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_FORCE_CORPSE_TARGET
SpellAttr9.comment: Causes the spell to continue its effects on the target even after one of them causes it to die.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_CANNOT_KILL_TARGET
SpellAttr9.comment: This can take the place of UNIT_FLAG_IMMUNE, which only prevents damage. This may also reduce scripting needed for a sole purpose.

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_LOG_PASSIVE
SpellAttr9.comment: Source: "Allows passive auras to trigger the aura applied, refreshed, and removed combat log events."

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_NO_MOVEMENT_RADIUS_BONUS
SpellAttr9.comment: A larger radius for the spell (if applicable) is granted if the caster is not moving?

SpellAttr9.name: SPELL_ATTR9_CHANNEL_PERSISTS_ON_PET_FOLLOW
SpellAttr9.comment: The channel will not be interrupted by a summoned creature that assumes the pet role.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_NONE
proc_flags.comment: N/A

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_HEARTBEAT
proc_flags.comment: Occurs when a spell heartbeat checks to see if the aura breaks, used in spells with that attribute at 25/50/75% duration to see if the spell breaks based on resistances.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_KILL
proc_flags.comment: Kill target (in most cases need XP/Honor reward).

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_MELEE_AUTO_ATTACK
proc_flags.comment: Done melee auto attack.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_MELEE_AUTO_ATTACK
proc_flags.comment: Taken melee auto attack.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_SPELL_MELEE_DMG_CLASS
proc_flags.comment: Done attack by Spell that has dmg class melee.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_SPELL_MELEE_DMG_CLASS
proc_flags.comment: Taken attack by Spell that has dmg class melee.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_RANGED_AUTO_ATTACK
proc_flags.comment: Done ranged auto attack.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_RANGED_AUTO_ATTACK
proc_flags.comment: Taken ranged auto attack.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_SPELL_RANGED_DMG_CLASS
proc_flags.comment: Done attack by Spell that has dmg class ranged.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_SPELL_RANGED_DMG_CLASS
proc_flags.comment: Taken attack by Spell that has dmg class ranged.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_SPELL_NONE_DMG_CLASS_POS
proc_flags.comment: Done positive spell that has dmg class none.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_SPELL_NONE_DMG_CLASS_POS
proc_flags.comment: Taken positive spell that has dmg class none.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_SPELL_NONE_DMG_CLASS_NEG
proc_flags.comment: Done negative spell that has dmg class none.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_SPELL_NONE_DMG_CLASS_NEG
proc_flags.comment: Taken negative spell that has dmg class none.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_SPELL_MAGIC_DMG_CLASS_POS
proc_flags.comment: Done positive spell that has dmg class magic.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_SPELL_MAGIC_DMG_CLASS_POS
proc_flags.comment: Taken positive spell that has dmg class magic.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_SPELL_MAGIC_DMG_CLASS_NEG
proc_flags.comment: Done negative spell that has dmg class magic.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_SPELL_MAGIC_DMG_CLASS_NEG
proc_flags.comment: Taken negative spell that has dmg class magic.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_PERIODIC
proc_flags.comment: Successful do periodic (damage / healing).

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_PERIODIC
proc_flags.comment: Taken spell periodic (damage / healing).

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_TAKEN_DAMAGE
proc_flags.comment: Taken any damage.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_TRAP_ACTIVATION
proc_flags.comment: On trap activation.

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_MAINHAND_ATTACK
proc_flags.comment: Done main-hand melee attacks (spell and autoattack).

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DONE_OFFHAND_ATTACK
proc_flags.comment: Done off-hand melee attacks (spell and autoattack).

proc_flags.name: PROC_FLAG_DEATH
proc_flags.comment: Died in any way.

shapeshift_form_flags.name: SHAPESHIFT_STANCE
shapeshift_form_flags.comment: Simulates not being shapeshifted to allow mounts/items/interactions
